title: “Sometimes even the…
text: “Sometimes even the wisest of scholars and archivists are fools. They think much learning gives wisdom. They are doubtful of every person and argue over trifles. I have found the opposite to be the better approach. Stineo said it best : Seek not to understand that you may believe, but believe that you may understand.” —Possidius Adeodat, Archivist of Kenatos
